summary: Iteration 122 - Nexus 8.0 Assessment Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Verified all 11 structural bug fixes from the assessment document: Frontend URL construction (DocViewer, ChatPanel, CodeRepoPanel use relative /api paths), WebSocket auth (WorkspacePage and CodeRepoPanel derive WS URLs from window.location), OAuth callbacks (SocialConnectionsPanel uses /social/callback, CloudStorageCallback is route-aware), Image gen provider wiring (supports gemini, imagen4, openai), Transcript endpoint exists, Replay rate limiting (returns 404 not 500), Support desk org_id scoping works.

ui_bugs.issue: Sign In button click doesn't trigger form submission - must press Enter in password field instead
ui_bugs.note: This is a pre-existing issue, not related to the fixes being tested. Login works via Enter key.

critical_code_review_comments: DocViewer.js correctly uses api.get with blob responseType for downloads - no BACKEND_URL import
ChatPanel.js transcript download uses api.get with blob responseType at line ~755
CodeRepoPanel.js ZIP download uses api.get with blob at line ~569, WS URL derived from window.location at line ~233
WorkspacePage.js WS URL correctly derived from window.location.protocol and window.location.host at line ~383
SocialConnectionsPanel.js correctly uses /social/callback path at line 34
CloudStorageCallback.js is route-aware - checks window.location.pathname for /social vs /cloud-storage
ImageGenPanel.js has provider dropdown with gemini, imagen4, openai options
routes_image_gen.py supports all three providers with proper API dispatch
routes_sharing.py replay endpoint has rate limiting (10 per minute per IP+share)
routes_support_desk.py list_tickets has org_id scoping for non-super-admins

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All code review checks passed, login works via Enter key

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 Nexus 8.0 assessment bug fixes verified. Key endpoints tested: /api/health (200), /api/support/tickets with org_id filter (200), /api/replay/nonexistent (404 not 500), /api/channels/{id}/transcript (exists), /api/platform/capabilities (returns features), /api/workspaces/{id}/generate-image accepts provider field (gemini/imagen4/openai). Frontend code review confirmed: no BACKEND_URL in DocViewer/ChatPanel/CodeRepoPanel, WS URLs from window.location, correct OAuth callback paths, ImageGenPanel has provider dropdown.

fixes_verified.frontend_url_construction: VERIFIED - DocViewer, ChatPanel, CodeRepoPanel all use relative /api paths with blob-based downloads
fixes_verified.websocket_auth: VERIFIED - WorkspacePage.js and CodeRepoPanel.js derive WS URLs from window.location
fixes_verified.oauth_callbacks: VERIFIED - SocialConnectionsPanel uses /social/callback, CloudStorageCallback is route-aware
fixes_verified.image_gen_provider_wiring: VERIFIED - routes_image_gen.py supports gemini, imagen4, openai; ImageGenPanel has dropdown
fixes_verified.transcript_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/channels/{id}/transcript exists and returns 404 for nonexistent channels
fixes_verified.support_desk_org_scoping: VERIFIED - GET /api/support/tickets with org_id filter works correctly
